name: Jellyfish Bridge
description: Exposes Jellyseerr, Radarr and Sonarr behind Jellyfin authentication so the Jellyfish mobile client only needs a single Jellyfin connection. Jellyseerr calls are attributed to the matching Jellyfin user via jellyfinUserId mapping.
overview: Bridge between Jellyfin and Jellyseerr / Radarr / Sonarr for the Jellyfish mobile app.

versions.changelog:
### 0.2.0.1
Revert the 0.2.0.0 web UI takeover — the injected `/jellyfish/ui/home.js` script triggered a browser HTTP Basic auth prompt on the Jellyfin login page and locked users out of the web client.
- Removes the FileTransformation registration and all injected ES modules.
- Returns to the 0.1.0.6 bridge-only behaviour (Jellyseerr/Radarr/Sonarr passthroughs).

v0.2.0.0

Add a full web UI takeover that ports the Jellyfish mobile home page to jellyfin-web.

- Inject custom ES modules into Jellyfin's web client via `jellyfin-plugin-file-transformation`.
- Render a hero carousel, Jellyseerr discovery rails (trending, popular, watchlist, watch providers, genre sliders, 5 mood rails, history-seeded recommendations), Radarr/Sonarr upcoming rails, and native Jellyfin rails (continue, next up, latest, per-library).
- Add a Seerr request modal with season selector (POSTs to `/jellyfish/jellyseerr/request`).
- Hide native Jellyfin home sections except the library shortcuts row.
- Style matches the Flutter mobile app (Fraunces / Fira Code / Inter, dark palette, pill chips).
- Includes a deploy-local fix: stop the container before swapping the plugin directory to avoid Jellyfin marking the plugin as missing.

Requires `jellyfin-plugin-file-transformation` to be installed on the target Jellyfin server (manifest: https://www.iamparadox.dev/jellyfin/plugins/manifest.json).

Add Jellyseerr `movie/{id}/similar` and `tv/{id}/similar` passthroughs so the "Because you watched…" rail can resolve.
- Both forward the full incoming query string (page, language, …).

Forward full query string on Jellyseerr discover passthroughs.
- `discover/movies`, `discover/tv`, `discover/watchlist` now forward every query param (sortBy, voteCountGte, voteAverageGte, genre, watchRegion, watchProviders, …) instead of only `page`.
- Remove `GET /jellyfish/jellyseerr/config`: exposing the admin X-Api-Key to authenticated clients is no longer needed now that the passthrough is transparent.

Add `GET /jellyfish/jellyseerr/config` — returns the configured Jellyseerr URL and admin API key to authenticated callers so the mobile client can hit `/api/v1/discover/...` directly with the full TMDB query surface (sortBy, voteCountGte, voteAverageGte, …). 503 when the plugin isn't configured.

Add Jellyseerr proxy endpoints to eliminate client 404s:
- `GET /jellyfish/jellyseerr/watchproviders/movies` (optional `?watchRegion=`)
- `GET /jellyfish/jellyseerr/watchproviders/tv` (optional `?watchRegion=`)
- `GET /jellyfish/jellyseerr/genreslider/movie`
- `GET /jellyfish/jellyseerr/genreslider/tv`
- `GET /jellyfish/jellyseerr/discover/watchlist` (optional `?page=`)

Also fixes the release workflow so the per-version changelog actually comes from the tag annotation (jprm has no `--changelog` flag, and `actions/checkout` needs an explicit fetch to preserve annotated tag objects).
